vulnerabilities.description: The current implementation does not utilize Helmet middleware to set security-related HTTP headers, which can mitigate some common web vulnerabilities like XSS and clickjacking.
vulnerabilities.fix: Integrate Helmet middleware to enhance security by setting various HTTP headers.

vulnerabilities.description: CORS configuration is missing. Without setting a whitelist for CORS, the application might be vulnerable to unauthorized cross-origin requests.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement CORS middleware with a whitelist configuration to restrict resource sharing to trusted origins.

vulnerabilities.description: Rate limiting middleware is not implemented. This leaves the application vulnerable to DDoS attacks by allowing unlimited requests from a client.
vulnerabilities.fix: Add rate limiting middleware to restrict the number of requests in a defined time window.

vulnerabilities.description: JWT/OAuth2 security configurations are not shown in the provided code. Ensuring secure configurations is critical for preventing token-related vulnerabilities.
vulnerabilities.fix: Ensure JWT implementation includes secure practices such as using strong secret keys, appropriate signing algorithms, and secure token storage.
